Localization.Description: Remote creation of a Windows scheduled task with AtSvc

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Access to the AtSvc network share object as user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} is detected. This can lead to creation of a Windows scheduled task to remotely execute commands on host {event_src.host}.
Windows scheduled task {object.name} was created as user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} to remotely execute commands on host {event_src.host}
